title: clinopodium axillare
intro: Clinopodium axillare, also known as Mexican oregano, is a perennial herb native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Clinopodium axillare include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and relieving respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Mexican oregano can be made into teas, infusions, and capsules, and it is also commonly used as a culinary herb, adding flavor to various dishes.
